THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST, IRIS JORDAN, WILLIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 93 6TH STREET #19, SAN FRANCISCO $1,039.88 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,039.88, LEASE FORFEITED
